prestazioni: Garrett GT2867R turbocharger upgrade for the GDI 1.6L turbocharged *Gamma II* engine (engine code: G4FJ), targeting 300+ HP with supporting fuel upgrades including a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU and Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, paired with a custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system from Milltek Sport featuring a 304 stainless steel construction and 76mm diameter piping

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping and 20mm of ride height adjustment, specifically valved for the i20 N’s 5-link rear suspension geometry, combined with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (18mm solid) to eliminate body roll under hard cornering

AP Racing CP8376-720 front brake kit with 355mm two-piece rotors and 6-piston calipers, paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines, complemented by a hydraulic handbrake conversion from Tilton Engineering for rally-inspired heel-toe downshifts
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the i20 N, featuring carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler, extending the track width by 50mm per side and requiring custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fit Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +30 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/18 front, 265/35/18 rear)

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a 30mm vented heat extractor and integrated NACA ducts to direct airflow to the Garrett GT2867R turbo, paired with a custom front splitter from Varis Japan featuring an adjustable dive plane and integrated canards for high-speed stability

Recaro SPG XL seats with custom-molded mounts to retain side airbag functionality, upholstered in Alcantera with red stitching and embroidered i20 N logos, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a Momo Mod.78 350mm suede steering wheel for improved grip and control
